svg.title: AI SQL Assistant Architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full pipeline from user question through Streamlit, LangChain, NVIDIA NIM, PostgreSQL, and back to results.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with the AI SQL Assistant?')
sendPrompt('What does app.py do in the AI SQL Assistant?')
sendPrompt('How does schema loading work in db.py?')
sendPrompt('What does prompts.py do and how are few-shot examples used?')
sendPrompt('How does the LangChain SQL agent work in chain.py?')
sendPrompt('What model is used on NVIDIA NIM and why Qwen3 Coder?')
sendPrompt('How does the SQL cleaner work and what does it strip?')
sendPrompt('How does the SQL execute against PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How are results displayed in the Streamlit UI?')
